creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
#bsdports on 2025-01-09T06:05Z logged a related failure in (some of) the e2fs* ports.  Have asked ketas to provide details here.

(06:05:27) ketas: hmm e2fs* gives
(06:05:30) ketas: : invalid option -- D
(06:05:31) ketas: Usage: gmake [options] [target] ...

(06:30:02) ketas: works without portupgrade eh
(06:30:14) ketas: what did it do...
